name: Store Asset
description: Stores an immutable, content-addressed asset on the venue. The asset ID is the CAD3 hash of the metadata — storing the same metadata twice returns the same ID. Use this to persist agent definitions, documents, configurations, or any structured data as a reusable, tamper-proof asset.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON metadata for the asset. The asset ID is computed from this object. Include a 'name' field for discoverability and a 'type' field for filtering (e.g. 'agent-definition', 'invoice', 'document').

content.description: Optional content payload stored alongside the metadata. Use for document text, structured data, or any payload that should be retrievable via asset:get but kept separate from the identifying metadata.
